name: law office administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For law office administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual reconciliation of client retainer fees is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual reconciliation of client retainer fees is time-consuming and error-prone.
